examples: She led a tranquil life in the country.
The tranquil atmosphere of the inn allows guests to feel totally at home.
There was no hilarity in the little town that same tranquil Saturday afternoon.
Six Mary's Place is an attractive Georgian townhouse where tranquil rooms have large sash windows and tiled fireplaces.
The grim reaper this time has emerged in the otherwise modest trappings of tranquil vegetables.
